label: SCORCHPOT
description:
Feed. Me.

A cozy-chaotic tabletop roguelike about dice, meals, and mild panic. Build your board, harvest what you can, and serve up dishes fast enough to stop your dragon from burning the whole economy down.

label: Steph + Goose
description:
Steph Kowal is one of my favorite r/comic artists! Her stories are always touchingly heartfelt and I just find her comics so cute! I was so happy when she agreed to share this piece with me for this collab tray.

Her blurb:

Hey there!

I’m Steph, a film composer turned comic artist! My comics are inspired by real memories: magical ones, weird ones, and oddly concerning yet surprising wholesome ones. If you're a sucker for nostalgia with the benefit of hindsight, you might like it here :)

Your support helps me keep making comics, telling stories, and chasing this wonderfully chaotic path I’ve stumbled onto. Follow me, sign up for the ‘Sunday Knewsletter’ and come along for the ride! :)

label: STEAMPUNK
description: "I am dedicated to sharing my music and art for free on Pixabay, a commitment born from a desire to provide safe, professional-grade images for all. Over the years, Pixabay has become a home for my creations, allowing me to offer them to you at no cost. Your support through donations, however small, helps sustain this mission."

label: Frenchie
description: Frenchie is a designer illustrator primarily focused on fanart and nature inspired illustrations (a lot of bug stuff!) She loves camping and off roading. Shes been doing acrobatics in San Diego for 11 years! Commissions are open please hire her she's desperate!

label: MXJ Eye
description: Marijana X Jakelić is a Croatian artist specializing in creating artworks that are often provocative and always beautiful. I'm very thankful she made so many of her gifs available for free online.

label: Well Keeper
description: A bullet hell roguelite where you move by flapping. Battle waves of enemies, upgrade unique and unexpected abilities and become immensely powerful!

label: MXJ Poppies
description: Marijana X Jakelić is a Croatian artist specializing in creating artworks that are often provocative and always beautiful. I'm very thankful she made so many of her gifs available for free online.
